description: VERIFIED LIVE: Asana via your logged-in app.asana.com session (session bridge — no Personal Access Token). Your profile, workspaces, projects, your assigned tasks, a project's tasks, and workspace members work cookie-only on the same-origin /api/1.0. Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in account — every endpoint below returned 200. (For server-to-server use the Asana token pack instead.)

tools.name: asana_me
tools.description: Your Asana profile (gid, name, email, workspaces). VERIFIED.

tools.name: asana_workspaces
tools.description: Workspaces/organizations you belong to (note the gid for other tools). VERIFIED.

tools.name: asana_projects
tools.description: Projects in a workspace (pass the workspace gid). VERIFIED.

tools.name: asana_my_tasks
tools.description: Tasks assigned to you in a workspace. VERIFIED.

tools.name: asana_project_tasks
tools.description: Tasks in a project (pass the project gid). VERIFIED.

tools.name: asana_workspace_users
tools.description: Members of a workspace (pass the workspace gid). VERIFIED.
